examples: He well knew the futility of trying to contend against witches, so he gave up discouraged.
As with Sisyphus, the boulder was painstakingly rolled upwards only to tumble back down again in an absurd exercise of futility.
Brown's article tells of the tragedy and futility of war.
He had been waiting for an opportunity to express artistically the horror and futility of warfare.
But relying on politicians to do the right thing is a prescription for futility.
